objects.query: SELECT Code, DataType, Description, Id, Name, Status, UnitOfMeasureId FROM AttributePicklist ORDER BY Name ASC
SELECT Abbreviation, Code, DisplayValue, Id, IsDefault, Name, PicklistId, Sequence, Status, Value FROM AttributePicklistValue ORDER BY Code ASC

SELECT Code, DataType, DefaultHelpText, DefaultValue, Description, DeveloperName, Id, IsActive, IsRequired, Label, Name, PicklistId, SourceSystemIdentifier, UnitOfMeasureId, ValueDescription FROM AttributeDefinition ORDER BY Code ASC
SELECT Code, Description, Id, Name FROM AttributeCategory ORDER BY Code ASC

SELECT AttributeCategoryId, AttributeDefinitionId, Id, AttributeCategory.Code, AttributeDefinition.Code FROM AttributeCategoryAttribute ORDER BY AttributeCategory.Code ASC, AttributeDefinition.Code ASC
SELECT Code, Id, Name, ParentProductClassificationId, Status FROM ProductClassification ORDER BY Code ASC

SELECT AttributeCategoryId, AttributeDefinitionId, AttributeNameOverride, DefaultValue, Description, DisplayType, HelpText, Id, IsHidden, IsPriceImpacting, IsReadOnly, IsRequired, MaximumCharacterCount, MaximumValue, MinimumCharacterCount, MinimumValue, Name, ProductClassificationId, Sequence, Status, StepValue, UnitOfMeasureId, ValueDescription FROM ProductClassificationAttr ORDER BY ProductClassification.Code ASC, AttributeDefinition.Code ASC, AttributeCategory.Code ASC, Name ASC

SELECT BasedOnId, CanRamp, ConfigureDuringSale, Description, DisplayUrl, DL_DefaultFareCodes__c, Family, Id, IsActive, IsAssetizable, IsSoldOnlyWithOtherProds, Name, ProductCode, QuantityUnitOfMeasure, SpecificationType, StockKeepingUnit, Type, UnitOfMeasureId FROM Product2 ORDER BY StockKeepingUnit ASC
SELECT DoesAutoRenewAssetByDefault, Id, Name, PricingTerm, PricingTermUnit, SellingModelType, Status FROM ProductSellingModel ORDER BY Name ASC, SellingModelType ASC

SELECT Id, IsDefault, Product2Id, ProductSellingModelId, Product2.StockKeepingUnit, ProductSellingModel.Name, ProductSellingModel.SellingModelType FROM ProductSellingModelOption ORDER BY Product2.StockKeepingUnit ASC, ProductSellingModel.Name ASC, ProductSellingModel.SellingModelType ASC
SELECT AssociatedProductRoleCat, Id, MainProductRoleCat, Name FROM ProductRelationshipType ORDER BY Name ASC

SELECT Code, Description, Id, MaxBundleComponents, MinBundleComponents, Name, ParentGroupId, ParentGroup.Code, ParentProductId, ParentProduct.StockKeepingUnit, Sequence FROM ProductComponentGroup ORDER BY ParentProduct.StockKeepingUnit ASC, Code ASC

SELECT ChildProductClassificationId, ChildProductId, ChildProductRole, ChildSellingModelId, DoesBundlePriceIncludeChild, Id, IsComponentRequired, IsDefaultComponent, IsQuantityEditable, MaxQuantity, MinQuantity, ParentProductId, ParentProductRole, ParentSellingModelId, ProductComponentGroupId, ProductRelationshipTypeId, Quantity, QuantityScaleMethod, QuoteVisibility, Sequence, UnitOfMeasureId, ChildProductClassification.Code, ChildProduct.StockKeepingUnit, ParentProduct.StockKeepingUnit, ProductComponentGroup.Code, ProductRelationshipType.Name FROM ProductRelatedComponent ORDER BY ChildProductClassification.Code ASC, ChildProduct.StockKeepingUnit ASC, ParentProduct.StockKeepingUnit ASC, ProductComponentGroup.Code ASC, ProductRelationshipType.Name ASC
SELECT CatalogType, Code, Description, EffectiveEndDate, EffectiveStartDate, Id, Name FROM ProductCatalog ORDER BY Code ASC
SELECT CatalogId, Code, Description, Id, IsNavigational, Name, ParentCategoryId, SortOrder FROM ProductCategory ORDER BY Catalog.Code ASC, ParentCategory.Code ASC, Name ASC

SELECT CatalogId, Id, IsPrimaryCategory, ProductCategoryId, ProductId, ProductCategory.Code, Product.StockKeepingUnit FROM ProductCategoryProduct ORDER BY ProductCategory.Code ASC, Product.StockKeepingUnit ASC, Catalog.Code ASC
